visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a large Costco Wholesale logo at the top center. Below it, a cartoon male character with a shocked facial expression and brown hair is positioned on the left. The main text in the center is colorful and stylized, announcing a weekly sale. The background shows the high-ceiling interior of a warehouse-style store with shoppers visible as blurred figures. (2) The scene cuts to a high-density display of purple Kleenex tissue packaging. The camera is steady, focusing on the large stacks. Yellow and white text boxes appear over the center of the frame, showing price reductions. (3) A cut to the meat section shows multiple plastic trays filled with raw, red marbled beef slices. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the texture of the meat. Price information overlays the center. (4) The visuals shift to rows of yellow Fernleaf milk powder cans stacked on industrial shelves. The packaging is bright yellow with green accents. (5) Subsequent rapid cuts feature a wide variety of grocery and household items: Viva mixed nuts in green boxes, dried shredded squid in red and blue bags, and large boxes of Oreo Party Mix. (6) The sequence continues through snack items including Kenji cheese crackers, Serena egg rolls, cereal bars, and Kid-O sandwich crackers. Each transition is a straight cut to a new product display within the warehouse. (7) Further products include mini Oreo packs, Pretz tomato sticks, Ovaltine snacks, and Combos stuffed snacks. The background consistently features the warehouse's metal racking and fluorescent lighting. (8) The video then showcases non-food items like character-themed pillows and blankets, followed by wine bottles, beer packs, red grapes, and mango sago drinks. Each shot is centered on the product labels. (9) The final segment displays frozen foods such as tilapia fillets, duck casserole, and soup dumplings, along with health products like fish oil and propolis candy. The camera maintains a consistent eye-level perspective throughout the montage.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male persona represented by avatar, approximately 4 customers visible in the background of various aisle shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main persona is represented by a 2D cartoon avatar of a man with brown hair and a surprised expression.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consistently depicts the interior of a large Costco warehouse, featuring high ceilings, industrial metal shelving units, fluorescent lighting, and distant shoppers walking through wide aisles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a high-energy male vocal introduction, shouting a welcoming slogan over a driving, high-tempo electronic dance music track. The BGM features a heavy synth-bass and bright percussion. A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition. (2) A second 'whoosh' SFX occurs. The narrator quickly names a product and its sale price with an excited, high-pitched inflection. The BGM maintains its constant 128 BPM energy. (3) Another 'whoosh' follows immediately. The narrator continues the pattern, delivering technical product specs and prices at a rapid speech rate with minimal pauses. (4) A series of rapid 'whoosh' and soft 'ding' sound effects punctuate each new product mention. The narrator's voice remains consistently high-arousal and authoritative, ensuring each item name is clear despite the fast pace. (5) Each new phase is triggered by a transition sound effect as the speaker lists dozens of products—including food, household goods, and health supplements—without losing vocal intensity or energy. (6) The video concludes with the BGM sustaining its energetic loop as the narrator finishes the final product listing, ending with a cheerful, rising intonation. No ambient floor or background chatter is heard, indicating a post-produced studio recording.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Item Catalog -> Informational Loop
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional catalog designed to inform Costco members about current weekly discounts. It uses a high-energy, montage-style format to display a wide variety of products efficiently, aiming to drive warehouse visits during the specified sale period.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to showing products on sale at a specific retailer (Costco) with clear price information and promotional text.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly functional and efficient shopping guide video using rapid-fire editing to maximize information density.
